# Specs-Driven Work

## Rule

Before starting a new log entry type, incident analysis, or technical proposal, check `.ai/harness/specs/` for an existing template or specification.

## What Specs Cover in This Repo

- `on-call-incident-log.md.spec` — structure for on-call incident logs
- `holistic-rca.md.spec` — structure for holistic RCA documents
- `technical-proposal.md.spec` — structure for engineering proposals

## When to Create a Spec

When you create a new log entry type for the first time, create a spec under `.ai/harness/specs/` capturing the structure, required sections, and evidence conventions. Future sessions will use the spec instead of re-deriving the structure.
